name: Post Office Cu Of Md, Inc.
description_short: Federal credit union serving Maryland Postal Service employees with savings accounts, CDs, mortgages, and loan products. NCUA-insured institution based in Baltimore.
description_long: Post Office Cu Of Md, Inc. is a federally chartered credit union headquartered at 900 E Fayette St in Baltimore, Maryland, with a charter number of 95742. The institution serves a specialized membership base restricted to Maryland Postal Service employees. As of the latest reporting period, the credit union maintains approximately $27.75 million in total assets, $20.57 million in deposits, $17.27 million in loans outstanding, and $7.09 million in capital reserves. The credit union offers a full suite of consumer financial products including savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), mortgages, home equity products, personal loans, and auto loans. Their current rate offerings include 4.20% APY on savings accounts, 4.59% APY on 1-year CDs, 4.00% APY on 2-year and 5-year CDs, 4.91% APR on 30-year mortgages, and 4.39% APR on 15-year mortgages. The credit union distinguishes itself through membership-exclusive access limited to postal workers, providing community-focused banking services to a defined occupational group. A notable limitation is that the website indicates the credit union is not currently NCUA insured, which is unusual and concerning for a federally chartered institution; specific deposit rates and loan rates are not publicly available on their profile page, requiring direct contact with the institution. The credit union appears to maintain a modest but stable operation serving its niche membership base. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with terms from 1-5 years
pros: Offers competitive CD rates (4.59% on 1-year CDs, 4.00% on 2-year and 5-year terms)
Provides full-service banking including savings, CDs, mortgages, and multiple loan types
Member-exclusive credit union with personalized service for Maryland Postal employees
Maintains stable capital reserves ($7.09 million) relative to asset size
Offers home equity products including HELOCs at competitive rates (0.99% noted)
Serves a defined community (postal workers) with tailored financial products
cons: Listed as 'No' for NCUA insurance despite being federally chartered—major red flag requiring clarification
Current deposit and loan rates not publicly available; must contact institution directly
Restricted membership (Maryland Postal employees only) limits access for general consumers
Modest asset base ($27.75 million) may limit product variety and customer service resources
Limited online information and incomplete rate transparency on third-party aggregator
best_for: Maryland Postal Service employees seeking specialized banking with rates competitive to national credit unions
Postal workers wanting community-focused financial services with member-exclusive benefits
Federal employees in postal service seeking stable savings and lending products
diagnosis: Post Office Cu Of Md, Inc. is best for Maryland Postal Service employees seeking full-service credit union banking with competitive rates and member-focused service. The critical caveat is the website's indication that the institution is not NCUA insured, which contradicts standard federal credit union regulations and must be verified directly with the credit union before opening any accounts, as deposit insurance protection is essential for consumer security.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
